texto: They were people, Tom and Daisy-they smashed up things and creatures and then retreated back into their money or their vast carelessness, or whatever it that kept them together, and let other people clean up the mess they made....
explicacao: Citação de f. scott fizgerald sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “They were people, Tom and Daisy-they smashed up things and creatures and then retreated back into…” articula reflexao, tragedy, people em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
